[[Major/Legends|Major]] '''Danthe''' was second in command of [[Imperial Depot 4290-1]] on [[Shintel]] during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He was one of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Heget]]'s young officers that accompanied him to the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]], and was later assigned to the depot along with him.

Following the [[Imperial Depot 4290-1#Betrayal|betrayal]] by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne|Sarne]], Danthe believed that the Moff would return, and pressed for the completion of the blastboat landing field. He maintained that the Moff's actions had been to preserve the security of the depot.

Danthe disagreed with Heget in negotiating with the New Republic when the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' arrived, but was careful not to openly undermine his superior's authority.

==Biography==
Danthe was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] serving in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He served under [[Heget]], a respected combat [[Commander/Legends|commander]], and Danthe followed his superior to the remote [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] when Heget requested a transfer.<ref name="SD" /> During Danthe's time in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]], the local ruler, [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], withdrew the region from the Empire in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], and had established himself as a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]].<ref name="TSB">{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref> By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], Danthe held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Major/Legends|Major]], and was Heget's second-in-command at [[Imperial Depot 4290-1]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shintel]].<ref name="SD" />

In 8 ABY, Moff Sarne's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] was [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|attacked]] by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]], forcing him to retreat with his [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]].<ref name="TSB" /> Falling back to Shintel, Sarne began uploading the arsenal supplies from the depot and transferring loyal personnel from the base to his fleet, and dumping those he considered "traitors" on the planet. Sarne also arranged for the destruction of all [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] units on ships stationed on Shintel, along with all [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]-capable [[Courier droid/Legends|courier droids]]. Finally, he placed an [[Mark III Merr-Sonn Defender Ion Mine|ion minefield]] in orbit. Sarne left the outpost with orders to hold the depot and construct a landing field suitable for [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray Blastboats]].<ref name="SD" />

The introduction of new personnel to the depot fractured the harmony that Heget's command had instilled, and the base split into factions. Heget's faction saw Sarne's actions as a betrayal, and wanted to disregard his commands and seek to contact Imperial authorities. Danthe and his followers, however, believed that Sarne would return and that his extreme measures were meant to preserve the security of the outpost. However, Danthe also contended that their duty was to re-establish contact with Imperial command to inform them of Sarne's actions so they could either stop him, or at least prevent from returning to Imperial-controlled space. Out of respect for Heget's authority, he was careful to not voice his opinion in front of the men, so as not to undermine the Colonel.<ref name="SD" />

A [[Standard week/Legends|week]] after Sarne's departure, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' arrived in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. Heget invited the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] to land, which they did after clearing a path through the ion minefield. Danthe joined Heget in greeting the command crew of the ''FarStar'', and was present when Heget offered a deal to the New Republic delegation; information on Sarne's whereabouts in exchange for passage to the [[Tanquilla Beach/Legends|''Tanquilla Beach'']] [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] to contact Imperial command. Unlike his commander, Danthe saw no reason to ally with the New Republic.<ref name="SD" />

==Personality and traits==
Danthe was a young officer who had suntanned skin and close-cropped blond [[Hair/Legends|hair]], and was noted for his ready smile. A reserved individual, he was known to be talkative when amongst his fellow officers.<ref name="SD" />

Danthe was trained to use a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], and specialized in the use of [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistols]]. He was also trained to use vehicle mounted weapons. Danthe knew how to [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] ground and hover vehicles, and specialized in controlling [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]] as well as other [[Walker/Legends|walkers]]. A capable commander, he was knowledgeable about Imperial law enforcement procedures. Trained to repair blasters, Danthe was also skilled in survival techniques and first aid. He carried a blaster and [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] during the course of his duties.<ref name="SD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Danthe's capsule in the ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' indicates that he too wanted to re-establish communications with the Empire. He is also referred to as [[Palme]], indicating that the capsule was partially mistaken.
